text: Could you wrap this gift, please?
That hat over there is too big.
Those scarves over there are a famous brand.
Good afternoon. Can I help you find a souvenir or a gift today?
Yes, please. This box here is beautiful. Is it handmade? And how much are those scarves over there?
Yes, this box is handmade. Those scarves are a famous local brand. Would you like to try on that hat too?
The hat is nice, but it does not fit. Do you have a bigger size? And is there a discount if I buy two?
Of course. If you buy two, you get a small discount. I can wrap this box as a gift for free.
Perfect. I will take this box and those scarves. Here is fifty euros. How much change do I get?

Good afternoon, and welcome to our shop. Let me show you a few souvenirs from this city. This small box on the counter is handmade, and it is a lovely gift. Those scarves over there come in many colors, and they are a famous local brand. If you buy two, you get a small discount. These postcards near the door are very cheap, and we can wrap any gift for you for free. Just ask if you would like to try on a hat or check a different size. Take your time and enjoy your visit.

I love buying souvenirs when I travel, but I learned to be careful. The first time, I bought a big gift that did not fit in my suitcase. Now I always ask three things before I pay. I ask if there is a discount, if they can wrap the gift, and how much change I will get. I prefer handmade things, not a famous brand, because they tell the story of the place. A good souvenir is small, light, and special. That is the best way to take a piece of the trip home with me.

First, Roberto walks into the souvenir shop and looks at the gifts on the shelves. Then he asks the shopkeeper about a handmade box and the price. Next, he tries on a hat and checks a different size. After that, he asks for a discount and the shopkeeper wraps the gift. Finally, Roberto pays, gets his change, and takes his souvenirs home.
How much is that hat over there?
These postcards near me are very cheap.
I love those scarves on the far wall.
Can I try on this jacket, please?
Could you wrap this gift, please?
Can I try on this hat, please?
Is there a discount if I buy two?
